---
title: "Saara Martinmäki"
---

::: {.profile-page}

::: {.profile-text}

## Policy Advisor and Data Analyst

Staff support, General quantitative research methods.


**E:** h.pazira - at - arq.org

[LinkedIn](#) | [ResearchGate](#)

:::

::: {.profile-photo}

![](../images/people/saara.jpg)

:::

:::
